headline: Kraft Heinz (KHC) Down 8.2% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: Kraft Heinz (KHC) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: 3 Cash-Producing Stocks with Open Questions
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.
